sections.paragraph:
Ἰωβήδ, ὁ indecl. (יוֹבֵד) Obed, David’s grandfather (1 Ch 2:12 v.l. Likew. as v.l. in the book of Ruth 4:21f [D. Buch Ruth griech., ed. ARahlfs 1922, 28]), in the genealogy of Jesus Mt 1:5; Lk 3:32 (v.l. Ἰωβήλ, Ὠβήδ.—Jos., Ant. 5, 336; 6, 157 Ὠβήδης, ου).

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

  1. ed. = edited (by), edition

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 486
